---
macros-file: polish-space/tex/macros.tex
notation-watch:
  - FreeVarsTerm
---

> \begin{mathmeta}
>   \type{term}
>   \notationtype{\FreeVars}{term}{\FreeVarsTerm}
>   \vars{x}{term}
>   \with{\vars{y}{term}}
>   \define{\FreeVarsTerm}
> \end{mathmeta}
>
> Nested local use: $\FreeVars{y}$.

After the block: $\FreeVars{x}$.
